ai_analysis.quality_context: Priced at AED 2,300 per sqft, this Type A 3-bedroom plus maid's apartment in Shoreline Al Haseer is positioned at a massive ~52% discount relative to the Palm Jumeirah market median of AED 4,854 per sqft. While Shoreline historically trades at a discount to newer, ultra-luxury Palm developments, this unit represents highly competitive entry-level pricing for the area. The 2,152 sqft Type A layout is highly regarded for its spacious, family-friendly flow, sea views, and direct beach access. Furthermore, the upcoming completion of the ultra-luxury Como Residences nearby is expected to act as a strong localized catalyst, elevating land value and prestige for the immediate sub-community.
risk_flags: Long-term tenancy lock-in until October 2, 2026, which severely limits immediate end-user occupancy and prevents immediate rental yield optimization to current market rates.
Active legal eviction notice served; while this guarantees future vacant possession, it may introduce tenant friction, potential legal disputes, or holdover risks.
Potential noise, dust, and traffic disruptions due to the ongoing construction of the nearby Como Residences.

Shoreline Apartments is an older development (completed circa 2007), which carries higher risks of aging infrastructure and may require significant CAPEX for renovations to achieve premium market value.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a prime capital appreciation and value-add play for patient investors. The significant discount to the market median provides a substantial margin of safety. While the October 2026 tenancy restricts immediate cash-flow optimization or end-user occupancy, the served legal notice secures a clear path to vacant possession in the medium term. An investor can acquire this asset at a low cost basis, collect holding income for two years, and subsequently renovate the unit to sell or re-rent at a premium, capitalizing on the localized price lift generated by the completion of the neighboring Como Residences.

description:

• Arabian Style Corner Villa
• Two Bedroom + Maids +

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Jumeirah Village Triangle (JVT), a mature, family-centric freehold community developed by Nakheel. This property is an independent, Arabian-style corner villa. JVT villas are highly sought after due to their exceptionally large plot sizes, which offer superior privacy and significant potential for capital appreciation through expansion. The 'Vacant Soon' status is a strong selling point in Dubai's current high-demand market, appealing to end-users looking to move in quickly or investors aiming to capitalize on current market-rate rents.
risk_flags: Pricing/Sqft Discrepancy: The listed 7,342 sqft represents the plot size, not the Built-Up Area (BUA), which is typically around 2,700 sqft for this villa type. Comparing the AED 756/sqft price (calculated on plot size) to the market median of AED 1,497/sqft (calculated on BUA) is highly misleading. On a BUA basis, the price is actually ~AED 2,055/sqft, which is a premium to the market.

Tenant Eviction Timeline: 'Vacant soon' requires strict legal verification. Under Dubai tenancy law, a landlord must serve a 12-month notarized eviction notice. If this has not been officially served, the buyer may face delays in taking possession.

Capital Expenditure (CAPEX): JVT villas of this vintage (built circa 2012) often require significant modernization, renovation, or MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) upgrades, which must be factored into the acquisition cost.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied valuation of ~AED 5.55M, this property should be analyzed as a 'value-add' redevelopment play rather than a turnkey yield asset. The massive 7,342 sqft corner plot is the primary value driver, offering an investor the opportunity to expand the BUA (e.g., adding bedrooms or upgrading the layout) to flip for a premium. As a standard 2-bedroom rental, the net yield will be compressed due to the high entry price. Acquisition is recommended primarily for investors with the capital and appetite for renovation and expansion.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is located in Yas Park Gate, a highly desirable gated community by Aldar on Yas Island, Abu Dhabi. Featuring premium plot attributes—'Single Row', 'Corner Unit', and the 'Biggest Plot'—this townhouse offers superior privacy, better natural light, and enhanced outdoor space compared to standard units in the master development. Yas Island is a prime investment zone known for high capital appreciation, world-class leisure amenities, and strong rental demand from high-income expatriates.
risk_flags: Pricing Anomaly: The listed price of AED 1,072/sqft is 45.5% below the market median of AED 1,969/sqft. This suggests the 3,731 sqft figure likely represents the total Plot Area rather than the Built-Up Area (BUA). If BUA is significantly smaller, the actual price per BUA sqft may be at or above market luxury standards.

Geographic Jurisdiction: While analyzed by a Dubai-focused lens, Yas Island is subject to Abu Dhabi Municipality (ADM) regulations and Aldar transfer guidelines, which differ slightly from Dubai's DLD frameworks.

Off-Plan/Handover Status: Yas Park Gate is a recently launched development; investors must verify construction milestones, payment plan transferability, and exact handover timelines to manage cash flow risks.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this unit presents a highly lucrative investment opportunity, trading at a massive 45% discount to the market median per sqft while boasting premium 'Single Row' and 'Corner' positioning. These unique selling points (USPs) typically command a 10-15% premium in the secondary market. If the pricing is verified against actual Built-Up Area (BUA) and holds true, this represents an arbitrage opportunity with high capital appreciation potential and projected net yields exceeding 7.5% upon completion, driven by Yas Island's robust tourism and residential expansion.

ai_analysis.quality_context: At 470 sqft, this studio is larger than the typical JVC studio average (usually 350-400 sqft), offering a more spacious layout. However, the unit is in its original, non-upgraded condition and completely lacks a balcony, which is a highly sought-after feature for tenants in Jumeirah Village Circle. The 'high floor' and 'open plan view' provide some aesthetic value, but the overall quality is basic and utility-focused.
risk_flags: No Balcony: Severely limits tenant appeal and reduces secondary market liquidity in Dubai, where outdoor space is highly prioritized.

Steep Discount Risk: Priced at AED 1,011/sqft vs. a market median of AED 1,683/sqft (a ~40% discount). This massive variance strongly indicates an older, lower-tier building, potential maintenance/service charge issues, or a less desirable sub-location within JVC.
No Upgrades: Original developer fittings may require immediate capital expenditure (CapEx) to compete with newer JVC inventory.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at approximately AED 475,000, this property represents a low-barrier entry into the high-demand JVC rental market. The significant discount to the market median suggests strong gross yield potential (potentially 8-9% net if rented at market rates). However, investors must weigh this high yield against poor capital appreciation prospects and exit liquidity risks due to the lack of a balcony and the building's likely lower-tier status. It is best suited as a pure cash-flow play rather than a capital growth asset.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Priced at AED 2,057 per sqft, this property sits approximately 39% below the Palm Jumeirah market median of AED 3,370 per sqft. risk_flags: Significant underpricing (39% below median) may indicate undesirable views (e.g., highway/monorail facing), low floor placement, or active litigation/disputes.

High historical service charges in older Palm Jumeirah buildings can heavily compress net rental yields.
Potential for upcoming special levies or building-wide maintenance assessments by the developer or owners' association.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a classic value-add opportunity with a highly attractive entry point into Dubai's most prestigious master community. Buying at a 39% discount to the market median provides a significant margin of safety and strong potential for capital appreciation. To maximize ROI, an investor should budget for a comprehensive, high-end renovation to reposition the asset for the premium short-term holiday home market or luxury long-term rental. ai_analysis.quality_context: The Signature (DAMAC Maison Mall Street) is a high-end serviced hotel-apartment development. At 1,372 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a significantly larger layout than newer Downtown Dubai handovers, which typically average 1,000 to 1,200 sqft. The property is fully furnished to hotel standards and offered vacant, allowing for immediate occupancy or rental placement. While DAMAC Maison provides premium hospitality amenities (spa, valet, concierge, pool), the build quality and aesthetic are tailored to a hospitality-focused product rather than a traditional residential tower.
risk_flags: High Service Charges: Serviced apartments under the DAMAC Maison brand carry significantly higher service charges (often 30-50% higher than standard residential towers in Downtown), which will heavily compress net rental yields.

Developer Discount: DAMAC properties in Downtown historically trade at a discount compared to Emaar-developed master communities due to secondary market preferences and historical maintenance standards.

Traffic Congestion: Located directly on Mall Street, the immediate vicinity suffers from severe traffic bottlenecks during peak hours, weekends, and Dubai Mall events, impacting resident accessibility.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 1,749 per sqft, this property trades at a massive 32.4% discount to the Downtown Dubai market median of AED 2,587 per sqft. This low entry point offers strong downside protection and capital appreciation potential. Given its 'Vacant Now' status, turnkey furnished condition, and immediate proximity to Dubai Mall, the optimal investment strategy is short-term holiday home rentals, which can absorb the high service charges and generate double-digit gross yields. It represents an undervalued asset for cash-flow-focused investors willing to manage serviced-apartment operational costs.

ai_analysis.quality_context: At 845 sqft, this 1-bedroom apartment in Orchid Residence, JVC, is exceptionally spacious compared to the standard 1-bed sizes in the area (typically 650-750 sqft). Being fully furnished adds immediate value for buy-to-let investors looking to generate immediate rental income without additional capital expenditure. JVC remains a high-demand hub for mid-income professionals due to its community infrastructure, parks, and relative affordability.
risk_flags: Significant underpricing (~34% below the market median of 1,438 AED/sqft) may indicate a distressed sale, building-specific maintenance issues, or a potential 'bait-and-switch' listing.

Orchid Residence is a mid-tier development; the high market median of 1,438 AED/sqft is heavily skewed by premium off-plan launches and newly completed luxury handovers in JVC, meaning this older property may not easily appreciate to that median level.
Potential for high outstanding service charges or developer liabilities that must be verified and cleared before transfer.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at an attractive 947 AED/sqft, this property represents a high-yield opportunity. If the listing is genuine, purchasing a fully furnished 845 sqft 1-bed at this price point in JVC offers an estimated gross rental yield of 8.5% to 9.5%, well above the Dubai average. The massive discount to the market median provides a strong margin of safety and excellent potential for capital appreciation, making it a highly recommended 'Buy' subject to rigorous physical inspection and title deed verification.

title: Fully Upgraded | High Ceiling | Vacant on Transfer
description: Experience coastal living at its finest with this exquisite 2-bedroom apartment situated in the prestigious Al Khushkar of Palm Jumeirah Shoreline Apartments. Boasting a generous built-up area of

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Al Khushkar, part of the Shoreline Apartments on the trunk of Palm Jumeirah. While Shoreline is an established, older development (completed circa 2007 by Nakheel), this unit distinguishes itself with a 'Fully Upgraded' status and 'High Ceilings' (typical of ground or top-floor units). The generous 1,603 sqft size for a 2-bedroom is highly competitive. Crucially, the 'Vacant on Transfer' (VOT) status adds a significant liquidity premium in Dubai's current market, where buyers highly favor immediate occupancy or immediate rental optimization.
risk_flags: Building Age & Maintenance: Shoreline is an older development; buyers should anticipate higher service charges and potential wear and tear in common areas/building infrastructure.
Upgrade Quality: 'Fully upgraded' listings in Dubai require physical due diligence to verify if the renovation includes MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) overhauls or is merely cosmetic.
Beach/Club Access: Shoreline beach club access policies and fees have historically fluctuated; verification of current access rights for this specific unit is recommended.
Trunk Traffic: The trunk of the Palm experiences localized traffic congestion during peak hours and weekends.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 2,277 per sqft, this property sits at a massive 32.4% discount to the Palm Jumeirah market median of AED 3,370 per sqft. While some discount is expected for Shoreline compared to ultra-luxury frond villas or newer developments (like Royal Atlantis), a fully upgraded, vacant 2-bedroom at this price point represents an exceptional value play. This unit offers strong potential for high net yields via short-term holiday home rentals or immediate long-term leasing, alongside solid capital appreciation prospects due to the low entry barrier on the Palm.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a spacious 1,330 sqft 2-bedroom apartment in Le Grand Chateau, Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), Dubai. At AED 1,000 per sqft, the unit is priced significantly below the area's market median of AED 1,497 per sqft (representing an approximate 33% discount). The 'Vacant' status is highly attractive in the current Dubai market, commanding a premium for end-users and allowing investors to immediately lease the property at current market rates.
risk_flags: Severe Metadata Discrepancy: The listing area is erroneously marked as 'Šešuolių seniūnija' (a district in Lithuania) instead of Jumeirah Village Circle, Dubai, indicating poor listing management or potential data syndication errors.

Underpricing Risk: Selling at 33% below the market median suggests potential underlying issues, such as high outstanding service charges, seller distress, or active maintenance/structural issues within the unit.

Asset Age: Le Grand Chateau is an older development in JVC (completed circa 2014). Older buildings in Dubai often face higher maintenance costs and depreciating community aesthetics compared to newer handovers.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this is a highly lucrative opportunistic play. Acquiring a vacant 2-bedroom in JVC at AED 1,000 per sqft offers a significant safety margin and the potential for strong gross rental yields (estimated at 7.5% to 8.5% given JVC's high rental demand). The spacious layout appeals directly to the family-friendly demographic of JVC. However, the transaction carries elevated risk due to the geographical listing error and the steep discount. Immediate steps must include verifying the title deed, checking for outstanding developer/OAM fees, and conducting a physical inspection.

title: DEC Tower 2 | 6.75% Net ROI | Marina Views
description:
Betterhomes is proud to present this well maintained one bedroom apartment in the iconic DEC Tower 2, ideally situated in the heart of Dubai Marina.
Property Details

Size: 823 sq ft
Asking Price: AED 1,050,000
Current Rent: AED 80,000 per annum
Service Charges: AED 11 per sq ft (AED 9,053 per annum)
Gross ROI: 7.6%
Net ROI: 6.75%

About the Property
This spacious and bright apartment offers a functional layout with generous living space, a well-appointed kitchen, and a comfortable bedroom with ample storage. The unit enjoys beautiful views and is currently tenanted, making it an ideal ready investment for discerning buyers.
About DEC Tower 2
DEC Tower 2 is a well-established residential development in Dubai Marina, one of the most sought-after waterfront communities in Dubai. Residents enjoy direct access to the Marina Walk, an array of dining and retail options, and seamless connectivity to the rest of the city via Sheikh Zayed Road and the Dubai Metro.
Key Highlights

Prime Dubai Marina location
Currently tenanted at AED 80,000 per annum
Gross ROI of 7.6% and Net ROI of 6.75%
Strong rental demand in the area
Access to world-class amenities
Easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Metro

Contact us at Betterhomes for any inquiries and to arrange viewings.

ai_analysis.quality_context: DEC Tower 2 is an established, mid-tier residential development completed in 2009. While it lacks the premium finishes and luxury status of high-end Emaar or Select Group developments in Dubai Marina, it offers highly functional layouts and a strategic location near the southern end of the Marina, close to the metro and JBR. The property's price per sqft of AED 1,276 is a massive 32.3% discount compared to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 1,884, reflecting its older age and secondary-grade classification.
risk_flags: Building Age & Maintenance: Completed in 2009, the building may face higher wear-and-tear, potentially leading to rising maintenance costs or future special levies for capital improvements.
Lower Capital Appreciation Potential: Mid-to-low tier buildings in Dubai Marina historically experience slower capital growth compared to premium, modern waterfront developments.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: The unit is currently tenanted at AED 80,000. Increasing the rent to current market rates will be restricted by the RERA rental index, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Secondary Location: Situated at the far end of Dubai Marina, which, while highly accessible, is generally considered less premium than the central Marina or Marina Phase 1 areas.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents an exceptional high-yield, entry-level investment opportunity in Dubai Marina. With a net ROI of 6.75% (well above the Marina average of 5-5.5%) and a low service charge of AED 11/sqft, it is highly optimized for cash flow. The significant discount to the market median price per sqft provides a strong safety margin. It is highly recommended for yield-focused investors seeking stable, immediate rental income rather than aggressive capital appreciation.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Priced at AED 2,343 per sqft, this property is positioned at a significant ~30.5% discount to the Palm Jumeirah market median of AED 3,370 per sqft. The generous size of 1,579 sqft for a 2-bedroom apartment, combined with a high floor and sea views, suggests a premium layout. However, the pricing strongly indicates this is located in an older, established development (such as Shoreline Apartments or Tiara Residences) rather than the ultra-luxury newer builds that skew the area's median price upward.
risk_flags: Potential high CapEx required for internal renovations to modernize the unit and match current luxury market standards.
The steep discount to the market median may indicate high outstanding service charges or pending building maintenance issues.
Risk of 'bait-and-switch' listing practices common at this price point on the Palm, or a highly distressed seller situation requiring immediate cash.
View permanence risks, as ongoing or future coastal/frond developments could partially obstruct the advertised sea views.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents an exceptional value-add or high-yield buy-to-let opportunity. Acquiring prime Palm Jumeirah real estate at over 30% below the market median provides a substantial margin of safety. By allocating a capital expenditure budget for a high-end renovation, an investor can unlock significant capital appreciation and position the asset to capture premium short-term rental yields (estimated 7-9% net) in Dubai's most resilient luxury waterfront market.

description:
Property Highlights:

- Built-Up Area: 1,234 sq. ft.
- 2 Bedrooms, 3 Bathrooms
- Fully Furnished
- Ready to Move In
- Bright Layout

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

- Outdoor swimming pool
- Fully equipped gymnasium
- Spa with steam room, sauna and Jacuzzi
- Squash courts
- Landscaped gardens
- Children's playground
- Barbecue area
- 24-hour security and concierge
- Underground parking
- Pet-friendly building

Location and Connectivity:

Kamoon 1 is nestled within Old Town, a characterful Arabian-style enclave at the heart of Downtown Dubai. The building sits steps from Souk Al Bahar and within easy reach of the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Fountain, Dubai Opera, and The Dubai Mall  one of the world's largest retail and dining destinations. Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard offers an outstanding array of luxury retail outlets, fine-dining restaurants, and trendy cafes, while Spinneys and Carrefour Market provide everyday convenience close by.

Downtown Dubai offers excellent connectivity via direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11) and Financial Centre Road (D71), linking residents seamlessly to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is easily accessible, and the community's pedestrian-friendly streets make walking a pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Federer.

title: Large 1BR Layout | Unfurnished | Pool View
description:
Discover upscale urban living in this spacious 1 bedroom apartment in Building 9, City Walk. Spanning an impressive 1,336 sq.ft, this unfurnished unit offers a rare combination of generous space, modern design, and a peaceful community setting ideal for both end users and investors.

The apartment features a bright and airy open plan living and dining area, enhanced by floor to ceiling windows that invite plenty of natural light. The layout flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining while enjoying tranquil views of the beautifully landscaped amenities and community spaces.

The bedroom is well sized with built in wardrobes, while the kitchen is designed with functionality in mind, ready to be customized to your personal taste. The overall layout provides flexibility to create a stylish home tailored to your lifestyle.

Located in the heart of City Walk, one of Dubai’s most vibrant and sought after destinations, residents enjoy premium facilities including swimming pools, fitness centers, landscaped areas, and 24/7 security. With world-class retail, dining, and entertainment options just steps away, this property offers the perfect balance between lively city life and serene living.

Experience elevated Marina living in this spacious 1-bedroom apartment in the iconic Princess Tower. Situated on a high floor and spanning 862 sqft, this fully furnished unit offers stunning golf course views along with a partial Marina skyline view, making it an excellent choice for both end users and investors alike.

The apartment features a bright and well-laid-out living space, modern furnishings, a generously sized bedroom, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and the panoramic outlook. Currently vacant on transfer, the property is ready for immediate occupancy or rental, presenting a strong investment opportunity in one of Dubai Marina’s most sought-after residential towers.

Residents of Princess Tower enjoy access to premium amenities including indoor and outdoor swimming pools, fully equipped gymnasiums, sauna and steam rooms, children’s play areas, and 24-hour security.

Property Highlights:

- Built-Up Area: 1,005 sq. ft.
- 2 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms

- Emaar - Burj Crown

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

- Temperature-controlled swimming pool
- Children's pool and play area
- State-of-the-art fitness centre
- Outdoor barbecue and dining area
- Multipurpose community room
- Active rooftop leisure deck
- Podium-level retail outlets
- 24-hour concierge service
- Round-the-clock security
- Covered underground parking

Location and Connectivity:

Burj Crown by Emaar sits on Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, placing residents at the very centre of Downtown Dubai. The Dubai Mall, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Fountain, Souk Al Bahar, and Dubai Opera are all within easy reach, offering world-class dining, retail, entertainment, and cultural experiences on the doorstep. The vibrant boulevard itself is lined with boutique stores, cafes, and restaurants ideal for everyday leisure.

Connectivity is seamless, with direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Financial Centre Road linking residents to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is close by, and the pedestrian-friendly boulevard makes walking a genuine daily pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Antony Federer.

raw_area: DEC Tower 1, DEC Towers, Dubai Marina, Dubai
description:
Brought to you by Xestate Properties LLC, this spacious 2 bedroom apartment is located in DEC Tower 1, Dubai Marina, offering a prime location and a vibrant waterfront lifestyle.

Situated on a high floor, the apartment features a bright and spacious layout with stunning city views, making it an ideal home for both end-users and investors.

Property Details:

  * 2 Bedrooms
  * 3 Bathrooms
  * Built-up Area: 1,490 sq. ft.
  * High Floor
  * Full Marina View
  * Fully Furnished
  * Kitchen Appliances Included
  * 1 Parking Space
  * Vacant On Transfer

The apartment offers a generously sized living and dining area, spacious bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, an equipped kitchen, and floor to ceiling windows that allow plenty of natural light throughout the unit.

DEC Tower 1 is a well established residential tower in Dubai Marina, known for its convenient access to Sheikh Zayed Road, Marina Walk, JBR Beach, restaurants, supermarkets, and retail outlets.

Building Amenities:

  * Swimming Pool
  * Fully Equipped Gym
  * Sauna and Steam Room
  * 24/7 Security
  * Covered Parking
  * Children’s Play Area
  * High-Speed Elevators
  * Concierge and Lobby Area

This property is an excellent choice for buyers looking for a spacious apartment in one of Dubai’s most sought-after communities.

About Dubai Marina:
﻿
Dubai Marina is one of Dubai’s most vibrant waterfront communities, known for its iconic skyline, luxury lifestyle, and lively atmosphere. The area offers a perfect mix of residential, retail, dining, and leisure destinations, with easy access to the beach, marina promenade, and public transport including the Metro and Tram. Residents enjoy a dynamic urban lifestyle surrounded by cafés, restaurants, shopping outlets, and world-class amenities, making it a highly sought-after destination for both end-users and investors.

For more information or to schedule a viewing, please contact Xestate Properties LLC.

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

Fully furnished, vacant, and move-in ready, the home includes two parking spaces.

Contact Leo Blomquist today to arrange your private viewing.

1 Bedroom | 2 Bathrooms | 1,058 sqft
Tower 2

W Hotel-branded residence - services and lifestyle managed by Marriott International
Prime position in Dubai Harbour, between Palm Jumeirah and Bluewaters Island
200-metre infinity pool - longest in Dubai

Access to private beach, rooftop bar, spa, cinema, and recording studio

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

Offering contemporary finishes, premium amenities and a prime golf course adjacent location, this apartment is ideal for both end users and investors.

	•	Swimming Pool + Gym Access

This bright and modern one-bedroom apartment features a spacious open-plan kitchen, living and dining area designed to maximise natural light throughout the property. The bedroom includes built-in wardrobes and a well-appointed bathroom finished to a high standard. The large balcony offers a peaceful outdoor space with community views, perfect for relaxing or entertaining.

Vida Residences Club Point is a newly launched residential development completing in 2029, offering residents access to world-class amenities and a vibrant lifestyle. Positioned next to Dubai Hills Golf Club and with easy access to major road networks, the community provides seamless connectivity to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina and key areas across the city.

Contact us today at Betterhomes to arrange a viewing on this highly in demand property.

Rising along Sheikh Zayed Road, overlooking Dubai Canal, AYKON City Tower C opens your world to luxury living in one of the most prestigious neighborhoods in Dubai. All the apartments have modern finishes and are equipped with everything for a comfortable living. Business Bay features all the luxury amenities that offer its residents a lively and charming experience of a new lifestyle. 

Located at the nerve center of Dubai, AYKON City is surrounded by Dubai’s most vibrant neighborhoods such as the iconic Burj area with its world-renowned landmarks, Business Bay and the Dubai International Financial District. On the other side of Sheikh Zayed Road lie the evergreen Safa Park and the urban leisure avenues of City Walk and Box Park.

Noura is one of three towers comprising 'The Residence Collection' with very high-class apartments overlooking the canal, horse stables and sea.

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations. 

Property Features:
- Low Floor
- 800.73 Sq. Ft. 
- Ready to Move In
- Community View
- Fully Furnished and Equipped
- Swimming Pool & Gym
- Allotted Basement Parking Space
- Close to Restaurants, Shops, Mall
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

Experience elevated contemporary living at Oxford Cove, a boutique residential development thoughtfully designed with modern architecture, premium finishes, and lifestyle-focused amenities. description:
Jade & Co Real Estate is proud to present this brand new 2 bedroom apartment in VYB, Business Bay.

- 2 Bedrooms
- Size 918 Sq. Ft.
- Bright and Modern Living Area
- Open-Plan Kitchen with Premium Finishes
- Built-In Wardrobes
- Floor-to-Ceiling Windows
- High-Quality Appliances and Materials Used Throughout   
- Balcony with Community / Skyline Views
- Dedicated Parking Space
- For Viewing Schedules and Queries, Please Contact Jade Morris (BRN: 27320)

VYB at Business Bay is a modern off-plan residential tower in Dubai’s Business Bay developed by Ginco Properties, offering contemporary 1- and 2-bedroom apartments with stylish finishes and panoramic city views. It features lifestyle amenities such as a fitness centre, swimming pool, outdoor lounges and family-friendly spaces, with completion expected in late 2025. Situated in a prime urban location, VYB provides easy access to key business, leisure and retail hubs across Dubai.

Jade & Co was founded to provide a boutique approach to the Dubai Real Estate market, which caters way beyond beautiful properties, as our exceptional agents source a lifestyle to compliment you. Our purpose is to provide an unrivalled service in the market, whether you are buying, selling, or renting, and our approach allows us to walk alongside our clients at every stage of their journey. For Jade & Co, maintaining long-lasting relationships is at the core of our agency.

Jade & Co Real Estate
Office: 610 The Onyx Tower 1, The Greens, Dubai, UAE

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities. 

Property Features:
- Spacious Balcony
- Fully fitted Kitchen
- Laundry Room & Storage Space
- Allotted Covered Parking Space
- 24 hours Concierge
- Infinity pools & Hi-Tech Gymnasium
- Basketball Court & Paddle Court
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

title: 40|60 PROMO | SEA VIEW | BEACHFRONT | ULTRA LUXURY
raw_area: Avita, Passo by Beyond, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Experience a new dimension of coastal luxury in this exquisitely designed 1-bedroom residence at Passo by Beyond, set on the prestigious Crescent of Palm Jumeirah — one of Dubai’s most iconic and sought-after addresses. This 877 home is a masterclass in refined beachfront living, blending sculptural architecture, timeless interiors, and uninterrupted views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s glittering skyline.

Step into a flowing open-plan layout where high ceilings and expansive glazing fill every corner with natural light, blurring the line between indoors and out. The living and dining area extends seamlessly to a private terrace, offering the perfect setting for morning coffee with sea breezes or evening sunsets over the water. The gourmet kitchen is crafted with sophisticated finishes, integrated appliances, and elegant stone worktops, making it as functional as it is beautiful.

The primary bedroom is a serene retreat, featuring soft textures, bespoke wardrobes, and spa-inspired ensuite bathroom adorned with refined stone finishes and warm neutral tones. A separate powder room, laundry space, and intuitive storage solutions complete the thoughtful design, ensuring both elegance and practicality.

Residents of Passo enjoy private beach access, a 40m-wide white sand shoreline, resort-style pools, wellness pavilions, landscaped social decks, and curated spaces for leisure, work, and connection — all managed with the privacy and exclusivity of a high-end residential community.

Just minutes from Atlantis The Royal, Nakheel Mall, and Dubai Marina, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai and both airports, Passo offers an unmatched location that balances island tranquility with city convenience.

Price: AED 4,146,000 | Size: 877
Your chance to own an address that needs no introduction — an exclusive residence where every day feels like a five-star escape.

description:
Knight Frank is delighted to introduce this one bedroom sea view apartment on Palm Jumeirah, Dubai. Positioned on a high floor with a full floor availability option, it offers a rare opportunity for both end users and investors seeking scale in one of the city’s most coveted waterfront addresses.

Spanning approx. 99 sq m (1,066 sq ft), the apartment is arranged around an open plan living and dining area with a modern fitted kitchen. A well proportioned bedroom is supported by two bathrooms, creating a practical layout for single or couple living. One parking space completes this freehold coastal home.

• 1 bedroom

• Open plan living

• Sea view

Key Features
• Prime shoreline

Community Overview
Palm Jumeirah remains Dubai’s flagship island community, known for its beachfront hotels, dining destinations and skyline views. Residents benefit from easy access to beach clubs, retail, cafés and leisure, together with convenient road and monorail connections to Dubai Marina, Sheikh Zayed Road and the wider city.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in VELA Viento – Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay.
